data.body: check-local-env.sh defines _read_cfg() and _read_cfg_list() helpers that spawn individual read-config.sh subprocesses, then calls _read_cfg 4 times at lines 82-85 for infrastructure.db_port, infrastructure.app_port, infrastructure.health_timeout, infrastructure.db_container. Same pattern fixed in config-paths.sh (ticket 1ddf-9210). Fix: use --batch mode to read all keys in one subprocess call, then apply defaults.
